name: nutest
description: A Nushell test framework: discovers and runs @test-annotated commands with rich reporting and output capture. Commands are imported unprefixed (e.g. `run-tests`, not upstream's documented `nutest run-tests`): Numan's activation currently imports the mod.nu file directly rather than the containing directory, so Nu does not apply its directory-name-to-module-name convention here. Artifact URL points at upstream's uploaded release asset (nutest-X.Y.Z.zip), which is byte-stable for hash pinning.
